remember: Students will be able to recall the classification and characteristics of Plant Kingdom.
Students will be able to list the different types of plant cells, tissues, and organs.
Students will be able to describe the structure and functions of roots, stem, and leaves.
Students will be able to recall the different types of plant growth and development.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of photosynthesis and its importance.
Students will be able to describe the process of respiration in plants.
Students will be able to understand the concept of transport of water and minerals in plants.
Students will be able to explain the importance of plant hormones in growth and development.
apply: Students will be able to apply the knowledge of plant anatomy and physiology to understand the functions of different plant parts.
Students will be able to use the knowledge of photosynthesis to understand the importance of plants in ecosystem.
Students will be able to apply the knowledge of plant growth and development to understand the process of germination and seedling establishment.
Students will be able to use the knowledge of plant hormones to understand the process of tropisms and phototropism.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the structure and functions of different plant parts to understand their importance in plant growth and development.
Students will be able to analyze the process of photosynthesis to understand the importance of light, water, and CO2 in plant growth.
Students will be able to analyze the process of respiration in plants to understand the importance of energy production in plants.
Students will be able to analyze the importance of plant growth and development in ecosystem.

ncert_objectives: To understand the classification of Plant Kingdom and its characteristics.
To describe the structure and functions of different plant cells, tissues, and organs.
To explain the process of photosynthesis and its importance in plant growth and development.
To understand the process of respiration in plants and its importance in energy production.
board_exam_objectives: To recall the classification and characteristics of Plant Kingdom.
To describe the structure and functions of different plant cells, tissues, and organs.
To explain the process of photosynthesis and its importance in plant growth and development.
To understand the process of respiration in plants and its importance in energy production.
